title: Foo Bar Time Grain Rollups
description: Fix broken time-grain rollup tables (hourly, daily, monthly) that have incorrect aggregations or missing grains. The rollups should support dashboard queries at different time resolutions.

tasks.description: Repair or create hourly, daily, and monthly rollup tables from raw events with correct aggregations.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse with raw events. Broken or incomplete rollup tables for hourly/daily/monthly grains.
